prompt: Minimalist commercial ad featuring oversized premium cheeseburger with perfectly melted cheese, juicy beef patty, fresh lettuce, tomato, and sesame bun, ultra-clean design. A young woman in all-white outfit leans casually against the giant cheeseburger, relaxed confident pose, eyes closed, also holding a regular-sized cheeseburger in her hand. Soft gradient vibrant warm golden-orange background with large bold white “CHEESEBURGER” text behind. Glossy reflective floor, soft studio lighting, modern high-end food/product photography. Bottom center tagline in small white font: “Juicy perfection in every bite.”
